name: Sigstore Rekor Log Entry
description: Structure of a transparency log entry in the Sigstore Rekor log.

fields.name: logID
fields.description: Log identity (SHA256 of log public key)

fields.name: verification
fields.description: Inclusion proof and signed entry timestamp

fields.name: verification.inclusionProof.checkpoint
fields.description: Signed tree head at inclusion time

fields.name: verification.signedEntryTimestamp
fields.description: Log's signature over entry and timestamp
